title: Join us in our NYC office for sunsets with monday.com (August 10)
excerpt: Attention NYC community members: you are invited to Sunsets with monday featuring Lincoln Center, taking place in our NYC office on August 10th. Get ready for a special evening for the workplace management community and …

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Attention NYC community members: you are invited to Sunsets with monday featuring Lincoln Center, taking place in our NYC office on August 10th. Get ready for a special evening for the workplace management community and join us our NYC office to connect with fellow professionals and enjoy a conversation with Lincoln Center on how they used monday.com to plan their entire summer series!

*More info and registration details here.
